title: OreRegrow
description: Fully configurable ore regeneration plugin with timers and custom shaped mines
body:
OreRegrow is easy to use ore regeneration plugin designed for Prison, Skyblock, and custom survival servers. Define mines of any shape, and automatically regenerate blocks using timers. You can have mines in caves.
With OreRegrow, mined blocks instantly turn into bedrock (or your chosen placeholder), give players drops + XP and then regenerate after a configurable delay.

**Features**
**Custom Shaped Mines** – Not limited to squares; mines can be any shape within your selected region.
**Weighted Block Chances** – Control exactly how often each block type appears in your mines.
**Automatic Reset Timers** – Mines reset automatically after a set time.
**Instant Block Replacement** – Broken blocks turn into placeholders and regenerate after a delay.
**Full Command Support** – Easily create, delete, list, and manage mines.
**Reload Without Restart** – Update settings and mines without server restarts.
**Custom Messages** – Fully translatable and configurable message system.

**Commands**
/or help - Shows help menu
/or reload - Reloads plugin configuration
/or list - Lists all created mines
/or wand - Gives the wand for selecting mine regions
/or create <name> - Creates a mine from your wand selection
/or delete <name> - Deletes a mine
/or blocks <mine> add <block> <weight> - Adds a block with weight to a mine
/or blocks <mine> remove <block> - Removes a block from a mine
/or mine <name> resettimer <seconds> - Sets mine reset timer
/or timer <name> - Shows remaining time until reset

**Permissions**

```
OR.ADMIN
```
